BREAKING: The odds of the Republican Party winning the US Senate in midterm elections fall to a new low of 60%.

Democrats are now also expected to control the House of Representatives, at an 83% chance, per Polymarket.

twitter.content:
Republicans in Congress need to wake up and get Trump’s agenda codified before it’s too late — Especially the SAVE America Act.

If these projections are right, we won’t have another chance…

posts.author: Taraa
posts.title: At least some people in the UK had enough.

posts.raw_content:
God is the one who fights the battles                                                                                 
God is the one who parts the seas                                                                                  
God is the one who shuts the lion's mouth                                                                       
God is the one who multiplies the loaves                                                                         
God is the one who heals the leper                                                                                 
God is the one who holds life and death in his hands                                                       
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                 
Your job is not to bare the weight of the world on your shoulders                                   
That job is already filled by Him                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                         
Your job is to Worship Him                                                                                               
Your job is to Obey Him                                                                                                 
Your job is to Trust Him                                                                                                   
                                                                                                                                         
Faith is not just believing what you can but releasing what you can't.                         
                                                                                                                                          
Cast all your cares to Him                                                                                               
Cast all your worries to the feet of Jesus                                                                        
                                                                                                                                                
You may think your dreams are dead, He is the resurrection and the life                        
You may think it's too late for you, but God raised Lazarus after 4 days                           
You may think you are too far gone, but He is the shepherd that leaves                                 the 99 to find the one                                                                                                    
                                                                                                                                         
When He speaks, death must retreat                                                                                     
When He moves, chains must fall                                                                                  
When He breathes, dry bones come to life again                                                           
                                                                                                                                                           
You have tried long enough, now trust Him                                                                    
                                                                                                                                          
That trust will shake the gates of hell and open the windows of heaven                        
That trust will bring joy in the middle of sorrow                                                             
That trust will unleash peace in a war zone                                                                          
                                                                                                                                           
When you give it to God, really really give it to God... heaven responds                          
You unleash something no man, no demon, no circumstance can stop                           
You awaken the power of a God who never lost a battle                                              
You awaken a God who never broke a promise                                                            
You awaken a God who never turned away a heart that cried out in faith                                   
                                                                                                                                        
Say "here God take it all" and He will step in and do what no flesh can                      
                                                                                                                                          
God's power does not flow through half surrendered lives                                           
It flows through hearts that say "though he slays me, yet I will trust Him"                          
                                                                                                                                        
He longs to carry you and take away your frustration, exhaustion, fears                       
He delights in lifting our burdens, calming storms, and wiping our tears                                  
                                                                                                                                        
He is not a distant king shouting commands from a throne                                         
He is the good shepherd that walks with us through the valley                                  
He is not just beside you, but in front of you, behind you, and within you.                                      
                                                                                                                                         
I know the pressure is real, the storms are fierce... but so is our God                       
Sometimes he calms the storm around us, but Hallelujah sometimes he                               will calm us in the storm.                                                                                               
                                                                                                                                        
Say to yourself "God's got this" because he is the only one who does                         
Say to your future "I am not afraid because my Father goes before me"                                          
                                                                                                                                        
Let God handle what you can't                                                                                                                                                                                            
Let Him prove himself faithful                                                                                                                                                                                           
Let Him show up and show off His glory                                                                         
                                                                                                                                        
Now is the time to fall into the hands that captures every sparrow                             
Now is the time to bow not in defeat but in holy reverence                                          
Now is the time to say "God I trust you more than I trust myself"                                 
                                                                                                                                         
God is not asking you to strive harder but to lean in to Him closer                              
God is not asking you to figure it all out but fall deeper in love with Him                               
                                                                                                                                        
Ask yourself "am I living as though God is not enough?"                                              
Ask yourself "am I chasing what this world cannot satisfy?"                                              
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                            
The Lord is waiting, the heavens lean in                                                                                                                                              
The hour is late, the time is now, eternity is calling                                                                                                            
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                     
Trust Him, Obey Him, Follow Him. Let Go and Let God
posts.author: Rosebud4Jesus
posts.title: LET GO AND LET GOD
posts.content:
God is the one who fights the battles
God is the one who parts the seas
God is the one who shuts the lion's mouth
God is the one who multiplies the loaves
God is the one who heals the leper
God is the one who holds life and death in his hands

Your job is not to bare the weight of the world on your shoulders
That job is already filled by Him

Your job is to Worship Him
Your job is to Obey Him
Your job is to Trust Him

Faith is not just believing what you can but releasing what you can't.

Cast all your cares to Him
Cast all your worries to the feet of Jesus

You may think your dreams are dead, He is the resurrection and the life
You may think it's too late for you, but God raised Lazarus after 4 days
You may think you are too far gone, but He is the shepherd that leaves the 99 to find the one

When He speaks, death must retreat
When He moves, chains must fall
When He breathes, dry bones come to life again

You have tried long enough, now trust Him

That trust will shake the gates of hell and open the windows of heaven
That trust will bring joy in the middle of sorrow
That trust will unleash peace in a war zone

When you give it to God, really really give it to God... heaven responds
You unleash something no man, no demon, no circumstance can stop
You awaken the power of a God who never lost a battle
You awaken a God who never broke a promise
You awaken a God who never turned away a heart that cried out in faith

Say "here God take it all" and He will step in and do what no flesh can

God's power does not flow through half surrendered lives
It flows through hearts that say "though he slays me, yet I will trust Him"

He longs to carry you and take away your frustration, exhaustion, fears
He delights in lifting our burdens, calming storms, and wiping our tears

He is not a distant king shouting commands from a throne
He is the good shepherd that walks with us through the valley
He is not just beside you, but in front of you, behind you, and within you.

I know the pressure is real, the storms are fierce... but so is our God
Sometimes he calms the storm around us, but Hallelujah sometimes he will calm us in the storm.

Say to yourself "God's got this" because he is the only one who does
Say to your future "I am not afraid because my Father goes before me"

Let God handle what you can't
Let Him prove himself faithful
Let Him show up and show off His glory

Now is the time to fall into the hands that captures every sparrow
Now is the time to bow not in defeat but in holy reverence
Now is the time to say "God I trust you more than I trust myself"

God is not asking you to strive harder but to lean in to Him closer
God is not asking you to figure it all out but fall deeper in love with Him

Ask yourself "am I living as though God is not enough?"
Ask yourself "am I chasing what this world cannot satisfy?"

The Lord is waiting, the heavens lean in
The hour is late, the time is now, eternity is calling

Trust Him, Obey Him, Follow Him. Let Go and Let God
